title: Binary Domain

notes:
Complains about donet 3.5 not being installed, but game runs fine despite this, if you find this annoying you can delete its setup file from "redist" folder.

Unfortunately, I don't have a microphone so I can't check if it works (you can use keyboard to issue commands as well),  and I can't rate gold without knowing if everything works.
title: Binary Domain

notes: Rename or delete dotnet 3.5 in the redist folder. After that it works fine, some minor drops here and there but overall totally playable
title: Binary Domain

notes: Complains about dotnet 3.5 on every launch (but it can be ignored). Plays mostly fine with keyboard and mouse (some keys like left shit can't be remapped, though this isn't a proton-specific issue). Performance drops in combat whenever enemy robots explode, but still playable. Had some issues with audio crackling, though switching to Proton 3.7 seemed to resolve this.
title: Binary Domain

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
